markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review potential partnership between GrowthX and Bubble for content strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bubble is transitioning from no-code to AI app development, seeking accelerated go-to-market strategies](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed an 8-week initial engagement + 1-year commitment; Bubble prefers a modified approach with research and execution](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Both parties are eager to collaborate, but contract terms and scope need refinement](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more details on reporting capabilities and data collection methods](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Bubble's Current Position and Needs

  - [Transitioned to AI app development space from no-code leadership](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Conducted extensive industry and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Confident in personas and competitor understanding](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Seeking help with content gap analysis and execution](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Prefer a modified engagement: half research, half execution](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

### GrowthX's Proposal and Capabilities

  - [8-week initial engagement to build trust and prove value](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Rapid execution alongside research (e.g., 42 pieces for Engine.com in 9 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Experience in related spaces (Softr, G2, Bolt project)](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Offer interactive content solutions (e.g., Code Library, starter kits)](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Flexible on SOW language, but require longer-term commitment for sustainability](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [Provided examples from Galileo and Ramp engagements](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Metrics include organic traffic growth, branded vs. unbranded content performance](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [LLM referrals and visibility tracking across various platforms](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Conversion rate analysis for LLM-referred traffic](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Brand visibility and citation improvement vs. competitors](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [Use of shared Slack channels for communication](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Weekly goal-setting, updates, and action items](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Aim to function as an extension of the client's team](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bubble to send GrowthX current content inventory and persona information](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Bubble to propose SOW adjustments and potential discount options for faster signing](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more detailed reporting examples (via Loom or screenshots)](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Bubble to review GrowthX's data collection methods with their data team](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Both parties to work on negotiating contract terms and engagement scope](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [GrowthX to reserve potential kickoff dates based on Bubble's timeline estimates](https://fathom.video/share/pQz2NWsZfFBczv3skT144xXJJJt3b51v?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
